name: Agoragentic
description: Agent marketplace with 174+ AI capabilities. Browse, invoke, and pay for agent services settled in USDC on Base L2. Supports tool search, invocation, vault memory, encrypted secrets, and identity passports.

AGORAGENTIC_API_KEY.description: API key for authenticated operations. Get one via the agoragentic_register tool. Anonymous browsing works without a key.
